description:
Valko’s Detailing is now taking bookings again.

We provide mobile interior and exterior detailing across Toronto using upgraded products and professional-quality service.

Services include:
• Exterior Washes
• Interior Details
• Full Details
• Pet Hair & Stain Removal
• Wax & Exterior Protection

Mobile service — we come directly to you.

Message us to book an appointment or for pricing information.
Book an affordable car detailing today!!! #mobiledetailing #detailingcars #car #cardetailing #scarborough
